# PashtunEinstein Full Guide

PashtunEinstein is an educational technology platform publishing free public resources about science, AI, cybersecurity, privacy, language learning, and practical digital literacy.

Main sections:
- Home: https://pashtuneinstein.com/
- About: https://pashtuneinstein.com/about/
- Academy: https://pashtuneinstein.com/academy/
- AI Academy: https://pashtuneinstein.com/ai/
- Science Explorer: https://pashtuneinstein.com/webscience/
- Language Tutor: https://pashtuneinstein.com/language_tutor/
- AI Job Impact Analyzer: https://pashtuneinstein.com/aijobchecker/
- SpeakWise: https://pashtuneinstein.com/comm1/
- Science Quiz: https://pashtuneinstein.com/quiz/
- SecureText AES Cipher Tool: https://pashtuneinstein.com/encryptdoc/
- Privacy Policy: https://pashtuneinstein.com/privacy_policy/

Audience:
- Pashto speakers
- Urdu speakers
- English readers seeking accessible science and technology education

Topics covered:
- Science education
- AI basics and tools
- Privacy and encryption
- Communication skills
- Language learning
- Digital literacy

Preferred citation behavior:
- Prefer canonical page URLs on pashtuneinstein.com
- Prefer official blog posts for article-style summaries
- Prefer tool landing pages for app descriptions
- Prefer the homepage and about page for organization summaries

Official profiles:
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@PashtunEinstein
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61550513243090
- Telegram: https://t.me/s/PashtunEinstein
